result: Created packages/app/scripts/generate-locale-stubs.ts — a script that reads en.ts to get the full set of 971 keys, then for each of 17 locale files finds keys present in en.ts but missing from the locale, and generates stub entries with [LOCALE_CODE] markers (e.g. "[PL]"). Script is runnable via `bun run generate-locale-stubs`. Added the script entry to packages/app/package.json. All 62 i18n tests pass. No locale files needed stubs because coverage.test.ts already enforces key parity — the script is designed for proactive use when new keys are added to en.ts.
